## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GrowthX's content strategy engagement with Udemy and discuss next steps for implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is 6 weeks into an 8-week strategy sprint to develop a content engine for Udemy, focused on driving non-brand traffic and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [The content will live on business.udemy.com rather than a subdomain, requiring alignment on website architecture and development resources](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Stef Miller (head of web strategy) needs to be more involved to integrate this into Udemy's broader marketing and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [Success metrics and measurement need to be better defined and aligned with Udemy's capacity modeling](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview and Current Status

  - [GrowthX is building an organic content engine for Udemy, focusing on SEO, AEO, and GEO](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Currently in week 6 of an 8-week strategy sprint, with ongoing engagement starting October 6th](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Initial focus was on AI-native teams, now expanded to broader skill focus](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Content will target business leadership/decision-makers across functions (sales, marketing, engineering, product)](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Website Architecture and Development

  - [Content to live on business.udemy.com, not a separate subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Proposed subnavigation differs from current site structure (horizontal bar vs. left-side approach)](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Need to involve Kevin and Tyler (Udemy's web team) in discussions about technical implementation](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide examples of well-executed similar content hubs for reference](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)

### Content Strategy Integration

  - [Need to align GrowthX's work with existing Udemy content strategy and team](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Focus on function-level content that's not too specific to avoid lifecycle management complexities](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Blend Udemy-specific value and messaging without being too pitch-forward](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [Incorporate Udemy instructors' perspectives into content (specifics to be discussed)](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### Roles and Responsibilities

  - [Clarified that GrowthX should not own publication strategy or distribution](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)
  - [Udemy has existing teams for demand gen, paid campaigns, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Need to define where GrowthX leads vs. supports/executes](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Meeting scheduled for Monday at 2:00 PM Pacific with Stef, Jen (acquisition team), Kyle, and Justin](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
  - [Include Kevin in future website/technical SEO conversations](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide examples of well-executed content hubs](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Better define success metrics and measurement, aligning with Udemy's capacity modeling](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
  - [Refine scope of ongoing engagement and submit to procurement ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/PCsHAyXz4AxwyTkjwsxsbmhVyyNBTQx9?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
